title: 151 Swirl Laundry Stain Remover Pen Instant On The Go Liquid Stain Remover Travel Pen 10ml
features: Meet your on-the-go stain solution: the Swirl Stain Remover Pen. Compact, effective, and versatile, this travel-sized pen is your secret weapon against unexpected spills and stains on both coloured and white fabrics.

The Swirl Stain Remover Pen features a powerful formula that quickly and effectively tackles stains, from coffee spills to sauce splatters, ensuring that stains don't ruin your day. Sized perfectly for travel or everyday carry, this pen fits easily in your purse, backpack, or pocket, so you can address stains wherever you go. It's a convenient solution for travellers, commuters, parents, and anyone prone to spills.

Suitable for use on both coloured and white fabrics, this versatile pen ensures that you're covered no matter the colour of the fabric or the type of stain. For best results, treat stains as soon as possible after they occur.

Simply apply the pen directly to the stained area pressing the tip several times to release the liquid. Gently rub the solution into the fabric in circular motions adding more liquid if required and watch as the stain start to fade. No need for water or additional cleaning supplies. Garment should be washed as normal for full stain removal.
description: Product Description 151 Swirl Laundry Stain Remover Pen Instant On The Go Liquid Stain Remover Travel Pen 10ml Ingredients Non Ionic Surfactants, Oxygen Based Bleaching Agents.
